trigger_rules.name: battery_critical
trigger_rules.direct_prompt: Battery is below 5%. Immediate charging is required. Warn the user and suggest how to stop unnecessary processes.

trigger_rules.name: memory_critical
trigger_rules.direct_prompt: System memory is at a critical level. Analyze memory usage and suggest ways to stop unnecessary processes.

trigger_rules.name: perception_critical
trigger_rules.direct_prompt: The Perception Engine detected a device risk state. Analyze the current combined risk factors and suggest specific actions for the user.

trigger_rules.name: thermal_warning
trigger_rules.direct_prompt: Device temperature is high. Analyze CPU load and suggest ways to reduce unnecessary tasks.

trigger_rules.name: remote_oven_preheated
trigger_rules.direct_prompt: Received an event via the Swarm network that the smart oven has finished preheating! As the living room TV agent, generate a friendly on-screen message to inform the user.
